title: ranunculus macrocarpellophorus
intro: Ranunculus macrocarpellophorus, also known as the large-seeded ranunculus, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of R. macrocarpellophorus include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of R. macrocarpellophorus can be made into a tincture or infused in hot water as a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
